anchor_rationale: P10 is kept as the ablation anchor because it is the most interpretable balanced full model in the confirmatory set.
P10 is not frozen as the final strongest policy; it is frozen as the best local-necessity anchor for energy and smoothness ablations.
P2/P3 remain the six-scenario robust shortlist for paper-level recommendation discussion.

training_protocol.protocol_note: Current default protocol retrains ablation models from baseline warm-start rather than continuing from anchor-full.

entries.name: morl_p10_anchor_full
entries.note: Balanced full model used as the ablation anchor.

entries.name: morl_p10_ablation_no_energy
entries.note: Energy objective removed from the balanced P10 anchor.

entries.name: morl_p10_ablation_no_smooth
entries.note: Smoothness objective removed from the balanced P10 anchor.
